nodes.name: George Such
nodes.summary: George Such是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括飘带尾霸鹟、Large-tailed antshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Large-tailed antshrike
nodes.summary: Large-tailed antshrike（Large-tailed antshrike，学名 Mackenziaena leachii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于George Such，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The large-tailed antshrike (Mackenziaena leachii) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In the more northerly part of its range it occurs in humid foothill and montane forest, especially in areas with large stands of bamboo
